summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG modern redesign. All 7 core login features and 3 additional verification tests passed successfully. Split-panel design, form functionality, theme application, and responsive behavior all working perfectly.

external_api_notes.issue: Returns 500 errors and WebSocket connection failures
external_api_notes.impact: None - frontend works independently, these are expected external backend issues

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with modern split-panel design (dark left panel with gradient, white right panel)
Login form fields (Identifiant and Mot de passe) work correctly with proper labels and icons
Password toggle eye button functionality works (password ↔ text type switching)
Se connecter button is visible and clickable with proper enabled/disabled states
Form validation works properly (button disabled with empty fields, enabled when filled)
Forgot password link 'Mot de passe oublié ?' opens dialog correctly
Global CSS theme (logitag-theme.css) loaded and applied correctly
Application compiles without critical errors - React app renders successfully
LogiTAG branding displays with blue 'TAG' accent and 4 feature list items
Responsive design works on both desktop and mobile viewports
No JavaScript console errors that break UI functionality
Theme verification: Manrope fonts, correct blue colors (#2563EB), gradient backgrounds all applied
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
success_percentage: 100% - All frontend requirements and design specifications met perfectly
